perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man wearing a newsboy cap and glasses talking directly to the camera against a purple background. A large 'Perplexity' logo and text overlay the bottom. (2) As he speaks, icons for Google Chrome and the 'Comet' browser appear. He uses hand gestures to emphasize points. (3) Transitions show screen recordings of the Comet browser interface, demonstrating AI summarization of web pages and map integrations with tourist locations. (4) The man reappears on screen, discussing pricing with text such as 'Comet Plus 5 USD/month' and magazine covers like 'CNN' and 'Fortune' appearing beside him. (5) He concludes by pointing toward the camera with a call-to-action text overlay.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with an enthusiastic and informative tone throughout the video. Upbeat, mid-tempo lo-fi background music with a steady electronic beat begins immediately. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume as the speaker describes browser features. No significant ambient noise is present, suggesting a studio recording. (3) Subtle digital sound effects (pings) coincide with the appearance of some text graphics. (4) The music and vocals remain continuous until the video ends abruptly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom throughout the video, translating the speaker's words. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Perplexity' (00:00), '挑戰 Chrome 霸權！' (Challenge Chrome hegemony!) (00:01), 'AI新創 Perplexity' (00:03), 'Comet' (00:07), '全球可以免費開放使用！' (Globally open for free use!) (00:09), '自動總結網頁' (Auto-summarize web pages) (00:17), 'Comet Plus 5美元/每月' (00:29), '訂閱收入八成將回饋給出版商' (80% of subscription revenue will be given back to publishers) (00:34).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Problem Identification (Chrome) -> Product Introduction (Comet) -> Feature Demo -> Pricing & Business Model -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey-brown newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, a light green polo shirt, and a brown beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A solid light purple/blue studio wall with a hint of a wooden shelf or plant on the right side.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem -> Solution Presentation -> Feature List -> Pricing -> Ethical Resolution -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To introduce the new AI-native browser 'Comet' by Perplexity, highlighting its efficiency features compared to Google Chrome and explaining its unique revenue-sharing model with content publishers to encourage user adoption.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to promoting the features and pricing of the Comet browser by Perplexity.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's signature newsboy cap and glasses style; social media handles '3c意思tim哥' and '3ctim' visible in the top left corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency text overlays and screen recordings to maintain viewer engagement in a fast-paced 'tech news' format.
